title: armeria australis
intro: Armeria australis, also known as the New Zealand thrift, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Armeria australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
